acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-python-modules SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The python model team is responsible for maintain the python-related packages for OpenEuler. The SIG has 16 core members and maintains 1616 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-python-modules SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-python-modules SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-python-modules SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-python-modules SIG maintains 1616 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-python-modules.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-python-modules SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-python-modules SIG has 3 Maintainers, including: wei Xiong, xinwei Hu, Zhao Yang. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
